releases.label: DR4
releases.summary: Fourth and final public data release of VIKING (ESO programme 179.A-2004), a wide-area intermediate-depth (5-sigma J ~ 21 Vega) near-infrared imaging survey in Z, Y, J, H, Ks with VISTA. Covers all highest-quality data to survey completion: 935 fields totalling 1,350 deg2 (slightly smaller than the 1,500 deg2 design goal), with single-band and band-merged catalogues including a total of 94,819,861 sources (including low-reliability single-band detections); 0.67 TB of imaging and catalogues in this release. Note: no VIKING DR5 exists — 'VIKING DR5' references in the wild are KiDS-ESO-DR5, which incorporates VIKING photometry.
